name: logic-lens
shortDescription: Semi-formal code logic review that finds bugs linters miss
longDescription: Logic-Lens applies semi-formal execution tracing (based on arXiv:2603.01896) to surface behavioral bugs, type contract breaches, boundary blindspots, and interprocedural semantic mismatches — the logic errors that cause test failures after syntax-clean code ships. Works with any language, any codebase.
